title: App Settings - General - Notifications & Device Alerts - Navigation
scenario: Navigate to Notifications & Device Alerts under App Settings > General and verify UI matches Figma design
steps: 1. Open the Poly Studio Mobile app (Home screen).
2. Tap the hamburger menu icon (App Settings) to open the side menu.
expected: Step 4: The Notifications & Device Alerts screen matches the Figma design. Step 5: User returns to the App Settings (General) page.
